name: CurveEnd
summary: Defines the extremes of a curve through a flagged enumeration.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Not the start nor the end.

enum_values.name: Start
enum_values.summary: The frontal part of the curve.

enum_values.name: End
enum_values.summary: The tail part of the curve.

enum_values.name: Both
enum_values.summary: Both the start and the end of the curve.
